message:
fix: use fixed-Huffman deflate in Zig WASM compression for pako compatibility

The stored-block zlib format was not compatible with pako v1 used by
excalidraw.com. Rewrote compress.zig to use proper RFC 1951 fixed-Huffman
encoding. Removed Node.js deflateSync fallback from upload.ts — Zig WASM
handles all compression.
